title: Arcana Publish Pipeline
subtitle: From commit to npm — v0.1.0 partial; v0.1.1 is the correct first full publish
purpose: Shows the publish path for v0.1.x. v0.1.0 was a partial attempt using npm publish (workspace:* deps not rewritten; arcana-provider-libsql missed). v0.1.1 corrects this using pnpm publish -r. NOTE: 5 packages in v0.1.1 (arcana-provider-sqlite-vec added).
publish_order: contracts first (no workspace deps), then core, testkit, provider-libsql, provider-sqlite-vec in any order
publish_status: blocked — npm login required (OTP browser flow); user handling manually

lanes.label: v0.1.0 — Manual publish (PARTIAL — do not rely on)
issues: Used npm publish instead of pnpm publish -r — workspace:* deps were NOT rewritten to real version numbers
arcana-provider-sqlite-vec did not exist yet at time of v0.1.0 attempt

stages.label: bun run lint
stages.note: Script exists; vacuously passes with no packages (--no-error-on-unmatched-pattern)

stages.label: bun run typecheck
stages.note: Script exists; guard skips tsc -b until packages/*/tsconfig.json exists

stages.label: bun run test
stages.note: Vitest passes; 212 tests, 5 packages as of v0.1.1

lanes.label: v0.1.1 — Manual publish (correct approach — pnpm publish -r)

stages.label: npm login (OTP flow)
stages.note: Blocked — user must complete browser OTP

stages.label: pnpm publish -r --filter='./packages/*' --access public
stages.note: Rewrites workspace:* deps correctly; publishes all 5 packages in dependency order

stages.label: publish.yml: for each pkg in dep order, npm view → skip or publish
Re-run on same tag is no-op
